productDisplayName: Puma Men Mid Funpack Black & White Shoes
description: This pair of puma shoes are a combination of bold design and comfortable materials. The shoe gives you that stylish edge and sets you apart from the crowd. Comes with a spare set of lacesUpperCanvas upper with chamfered heel made of contrast graphic and puma logoExtra hook and loop fastening around ankle for snug Fit and absolute comfortSynthetic twill tape laces in dual tone looped around metallic eyeletsSynthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefootCanvas stylish side strips in contrast colourMidsoleComfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable fitTextile lining for added comfortOutsoleMade of high traction gum rubberRubber toe guard strip with tonal sidewall tripTextured to suit the anatomy of the feet for maximum gripReinforced heel with dip in back collar line to prevent Achilles tendon irritationShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
